utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Checking the final package: (1) destination is present and fully specified as 'Lisbon, Portugal'; (2) travel_dates is fully specified '2024-09-25 to 2024-09-29'; (3) transportation includes flight details, route, and costs; (4) accommodation includes hotel name, type, amenities, room type, and costs; (5) activities are listed with activities and total cost estimate (even if zero, it is specified); (6) additional_services includes dining details, prices, and special requests; (7) total_budget includes total estimated cost, limit, remaining budget, and currency. All 7 items are covered with sufficient details.
